eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Cape May, NJ; at 7:10 AM on JUL 10, 2026 Effective until 11:10 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Wildwood Crest Police are searching for Maria Cecco, 75, last seen near Stockton Road and the beach. She has Alzheimer's and diabetes, is 5'2", speaks limited English (primarily Italian), and was last seen wearing a blue T-shirt and black pants. Call 911 immediately if seen. n/a
